diagnostics.strategy_rationale: Mode full: ~500 rows, below the ~100K chunked threshold, so a single-pass copy is cheapest. Parallelism: single worker — only chunked mode benefits from parallelism; parallel=1 fits the 2048 MB budget at ~35 MB peak. Risk — resumable: no — a failed run restarts from the beginning; memory: bounded to ~35 MB peak.
